description: Runtime foundation profile and external dependency contract for Nebula Calligraphy deployments.

runtimeProfiles.trial: Default local development profile. Missing persistence settings fall back to memory.
runtimeProfiles.production: Controlled production-trial profile. Requires local persistent files for auth, drafts, learning, audit, exports, and web app assets.
runtimeProfiles.managed: External foundation profile. Requires database, identity, object storage, audit sink, and web app configuration.

operations.GET /metrics: Returns Prometheus text metrics for request count and uptime.
operations.GET /api/v1/calligraphy/runtime-config: Returns browser-safe runtime profile and Identity login settings without secrets.
operations.go run ./cmd/calligraphy-migrate: Applies PostgreSQL tables and indexes required by managed mode.
operations.scripts/calligraphy-backup.sh: Backs up local production-trial files and artifact directory.
operations.scripts/calligraphy-restore.sh: Restores local production-trial files and artifact directory.

managedAdapters.identity: JWKS/RS256 Bearer-token verifier using CALLIGRAPHY_IDENTITY_ISSUER and CALLIGRAPHY_IDENTITY_JWKS_URL, or Nebula HS256 token verification using CALLIGRAPHY_IDENTITY_HS256_SECRET. Browser login prefers standard oidc-pkce via CALLIGRAPHY_IDENTITY_BASE_URL and CALLIGRAPHY_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID, with nebula-direct available as an explicit compatibility fallback.
managedAdapters.persistence: PostgreSQL stores for local users/sessions compatibility, artwork drafts, favorites, and practice records.
managedAdapters.objectStorage: S3-compatible PutObject artifact store using CALLIGRAPHY_OBJECT_STORAGE_* settings.
managedAdapters.audit: HTTP/HTTPS JSON audit-event POST sink using CALLIGRAPHY_AUDIT_SINK and optional CALLIGRAPHY_AUDIT_TOKEN.
